items.title: Max Hodak’s Science Corp. preparing to place first sensor in human brain
items.summary: Science Corp., led by Neuralink co-founder Max Hodak, is reportedly preparing for its initial human brain sensor implantation, marking a significant step in brain-computer interface technology.

items.title: Google adds AI Skills to Chrome for workflow automation
items.summary: Google is integrating new AI Skills into its Chrome browser, allowing users to save and automate their favorite AI-powered workflows directly within the browser.

items.title: Anthropic co-founder confirms briefing Trump administration on Mythos
items.summary: Anthropic's co-founder has confirmed that the company briefed the Trump administration on its advanced AI model, Mythos, highlighting growing engagement between AI developers and government.

items.title: OpenAI scales trusted access for cyber defense
items.summary: OpenAI is focusing on enhancing trusted access solutions to bolster cyber defense capabilities, indicating a strategic move into national security applications for AI.

items.title: Turn your best AI prompts into one-click tools in Chrome
items.summary: Google's new Chrome feature allows users to transform their most effective AI prompts into convenient one-click tools, streamlining AI interaction for everyday tasks.

items.title: QuanBench+: A Unified Multi-Framework Benchmark for LLM-Based Quantum Code Generation
items.summary: QuanBench+ introduces a new unified benchmark designed to evaluate Large Language Models' performance in generating quantum code across various frameworks.

items.title: The Past Is Not Past: Memory-Enhanced Dynamic Reward Shaping
items.summary: Researchers propose a novel method called Memory-Enhanced Dynamic Reward Shaping to improve reinforcement learning by leveraging past experiences for more effective reward signals.

items.title: OmniShow: Unifying Multimodal Conditions for Human-Object Interaction Video Generation
items.summary: OmniShow presents a new approach to generate videos of human-object interactions by unifying various multimodal conditions, advancing the field of realistic video synthesis.

items.title: Attention Sink in Transformers: A Survey on Utilization, Interpretation, and Mitigation
items.summary: A comprehensive survey explores the phenomenon of 'attention sink' in Transformer models, analyzing its utilization, interpretation, and potential mitigation strategies.

items.title: TESSERA — A pixel-wise earth observation foundation model
items.summary: TESSERA introduces a new pixel-wise foundation model for earth observation, promising enhanced capabilities for analyzing satellite imagery and geospatial data.

items.title: Amazon Bedrock for Beginners From First Prompt to AI Agent (Full Tutorial)
items.summary: A detailed tutorial guides beginners through the process of using Amazon Bedrock, from initial prompts to deploying fully functional AI agents.

items.title: Your Job Isn't Going Away. But Someone's Fundraise Depends on You Thinking It Is.
items.summary: An opinion piece argues against the narrative of widespread job displacement by AI, suggesting it's often driven by companies seeking investment.

items.title: Building a Privacy-First Voice-Controlled AI Agent with Local LLMs 🎙️->🤖
items.summary: This guide demonstrates how to create a voice-controlled AI agent that prioritizes privacy by utilizing local Large Language Models.

items.title: Agentic Aggregation for Parallel Scaling of Long-Horizon Agentic Tasks
items.summary: This paper proposes a method for 'Agentic Aggregation' to enable parallel scaling of complex, long-horizon tasks performed by AI agents.

items.title: Solving Physics Olympiad via Reinforcement Learning on Physics Simulators
items.summary: Researchers explore using reinforcement learning on physics simulators to solve complex problems typically found in Physics Olympiads, showcasing AI's problem-solving capabilities.
